subcodes.first_line: I bear witness, O my God, to Thy oneness and singleness, and that Thou art God, the Single, the One, the Alone, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اشهد یا الهی بوحدانیتک و فردانیتک و بانک انت الله الفرد الواحد الاحد الصمد
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @eulogies; reminiscences, @martyrs and martyrdom
